title: VFM - Blue Oxford Picnic Blanket - Waterproof Gingham - Summit
features: Summer Fun: Firstly, there’s no better way to enjoy the warm weather than a family outing to the park or beach. However, there’s nothing worse than finding the ground is damp, and having nothing to sit on! Therefore, protect your clothes from getting muddy or wet with this fabulous waterproof, moisture proof PVC backed blanket.

ANYTIME, ANYWHERE: : Moreover, this thick light-blue blanket is great for any occasion in which you’ll be seated on the floor. For instance, whether you’re on a camping holiday or sunbathing in your own garden, this timeless patterned mat is absolutely ideal. Help prevent grass stained trousers or sand filled shoes by laying out this Blue Oxford Picnic Blanket on any surface.

Portable Picnic: Thirdly, this traditional Blue Oxford Picnic Blanket features a carry handle for straightforward transportation. In addition, the Hook and Loop fastening allows you to quickly and neatly fold it away after use. Furthermore, this compact product can easily be stored in the car as you never know when you might need it!

Top Notch: Besides being super convenient, this elegant blanket is built to last, as it’s made with high quality material. As the fabric is easy to clean, this durable cloth Blue Oxford Picnic Blanket can be used again and again! The understated design coordinates well with any style, be it cottage chic or casual contemporary.

Perfect Size: Lastly, measuring approximately 145cm x 80cm, this classic chequered mat is just right for couples and small families. There’s plenty of room to lay out a fantastic feast or stretch out and take a nap in the sun!
